title: narcissus assoanus subsp. rivas-martinezii
intro: Narcissus assoanus subsp. rivas-martinezii is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Narcissus assoanus plant, found in the Iberian Peninsula, and is characterized by its unique appearance and fragrance. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Narcissus assoanus subsp. rivas-martinezii include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of essential oil, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
